commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair job is needed; maintainers should review the session-display fallback and wait for latest-head checks.; Cleared: The diff touches gateway projection logic and tests only; I found no concrete security or supply-chain concern. (sha=09347148b8893e24c44b63b0760b78f12f75822f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway direct-session account-name fallback for session row display and sessions.list search, with regression tests for explicit labels, meaningful origin labels, default accounts, non-default agents, and normalized account ids.

PR surface: Source +223, Tests +370. Total +593 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main falls back to entry.label/origin.label for direct session rows and search, so a Feishu direct session with an opaque origin.label and a configured account name source-reproduces the reported behavior.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair job is needed; maintainers should review the session-display fallback and wait for latest-head checks.

target.title: fix(sessions): use account names for direct display
target.body:
## Summary

- Use configured channel account names as the display fallback for direct session rows when the current label is only an opaque direct peer id.
- Preserve existing precedence for explicit `displayName`, session labels, group display names, and meaningful origin labels.
- Include the account-name fallback in `sessions.list` search so users can find the readable account name.

Closes #79183

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Direct Feishu-style session rows show the configured channel account name instead of an opaque direct peer id when no stronger label exists, and `sessions.list` search can find that readable account name. This also covers the reviewed edge cases for non-`main` default agents and normalized account ids.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch (`codex/session-display-account-name-79183-20260618`) at `09347148b8893e24c44b63b0760b78f12f75822f`, exercising the actual `listSessionsFromStore` sessions.list projection path with a redacted Feishu direct-session store and channel account config.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```text
node --import tsx -e "import { listSessionsFromStore } from './src/gateway/session-utils.ts'; /* redacted sessions.list projection */"
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=dot
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix: Copied live output from the local redacted sessions.list projection run:

```json
{
  "scenario": "redacted sessions.list account-name fallback live output",
  "all": [
    {
      "key": "agent:ops:feishu:direct:ou_redacted_default",
      "displayName": "Router Display"
    },
    {
      "key": "agent:quote:feishu:direct:ou_redacted_quote",
      "displayName": "Quote Assistant"
    }
  ],
  "searchRouter": [
    {
      "key": "agent:ops:feishu:direct:ou_redacted_default",
      "displayName": "Router Display"
    }
  ],
  "searchQuote": [
    {
      "key": "agent:quote:feishu:direct:ou_redacted_quote",
      "displayName": "Quote Assistant"
    }
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: The redacted sessions.list output shows the resolved default agent `ops` using the normalized configured default account `Router D` -> `router-d` and displaying/searching as `Router Display`, while the non-default `quote` direct row still displays/searches as `Quote Assistant` before the default account fallback.

What was not tested: No live Feishu network call was made; the proof uses redacted local persisted session data through the same gateway sessions.list projection path that formats and filters stored direct-session rows.

Supplemental local checks:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=dot

Test Files  8 passed (8)
Tests  560 passed (560)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 42.31s

git diff --check
```

commands.author: leno23
commands.command: re-review — added a 'semantic change — for maintainer review' section: only the (non-fatal success + delivery-error + non-aborted) path is reclassified to ok + deliverystatus:not-delivered; genuine execution failures still record error and trigger backoff/alerts, and delivery failure stays visible via the deliverystatus column. no schema/provider/channel changes. fixes #94058
commands.freeform_prompt: — Added a 'Semantic change — for maintainer review' section: only the (non-fatal success + delivery-error + non-aborted) path is reclassified to ok + deliveryStatus:not-delivered; genuine execution failures still record error and trigger backoff/alerts, and delivery failure stays visible via the deliveryStatus column. No schema/provider/channel changes. Fixes #94058.

commands.author: leno23
commands.command:
re-review: addressed the direct-session account fallback issue. for omitted-account direct keys such as `agent:main:feishu:direct:<peer>`, display-name resolution now tries configured `channels.<channel>.defaultaccount` and implicit `accounts.default` before falling back to the parsed agent id.

validation:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
commands.freeform_prompt:
addressed the direct-session account fallback issue. For omitted-account direct keys such as `agent:main:feishu:direct:<peer>`, display-name resolution now tries configured `channels.<channel>.defaultAccount` and implicit `accounts.default` before falling back to the parsed agent id.

Validation:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
